title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Savills India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
